# init(_:)

**Initializer**

Creates a [doc://com.apple.Link-Presentation/documentation/LinkPresentation/LinkMetadata] value from a [doc://com.apple.Link-Presentation/documentation/LinkPresentation/LPLinkMetadata] instance.

## Declaration

```swift
nonisolated init?(_ metadata: sending LPLinkMetadata)
```

## Parameters

- **metadata**: The `LPLinkMetadata` instance to convert from.
